verdict: 2026-07-24 (America/Los_Angeles) — The scoped plan-stage shape is sound and ready to ship. The per-unit code classification closes the remaining architectural gap: eligibility, L1 scheduling, pricing, coverage reporting, schema, and semantic validation now share one `codeUnitIds` invariant. The canonical priced plan, consult boundary, deployment/gate wiring, and loud engine stop are coherent. The recorded OPS-13 engine work and OPS-15 prompts-as-code work remain properly deferred and were not reopened.
